intel_overview.headline_zh: UPC机制深化与SEP仲裁转向重塑欧洲IP格局
intel_overview.headline_en: UPC Maturity and SEP Arbitration Reshape European IP Landscape
intel_overview.summary_zh: 2026年上半年，欧洲IP生态呈现司法成熟化与程序多元化趋势。统一专利法院（UPC）发布年报并上线PMAC调解系统，标志其从初创走向稳定运营，替代性争议解决成为新焦点。英国上诉法院在诺基亚案中确立FRAND纠纷仲裁优先原则，暗示诉讼策略向非诉机制转移。同时，EPO推进无纸化及指南修订，欧盟法院在版权与商标领域强化权利平衡。整体态势显示，欧洲IP保护正从单一诉讼向“诉讼+调解+仲裁”复合体系演进，合规与成本控制要求显著提高。
top_signals: UPC PMAC调解与仲裁系统正式上线，替代性争议解决机制进入实操阶段
英国上诉法院裁定中止FRAND诉讼，推动标准必要专利纠纷转向仲裁
EPO拟在2027指南中强制要求指明修改依据并引用UPC判例
利摩日瓷器注册为首个欧盟手工业地理标志，GI保护范围实质性扩展
cross_currents: 司法效率与成本博弈：UPC的高效判决与PMAC的低成本调解形成互补，迫使权利人根据案件性质精准选择维权路径，单纯依赖诉讼的策略风险增加。
审查标准趋同化：EPO主动吸纳UPC判例入指南，表明行政审查与司法裁判标准正在加速融合，专利申请阶段的稳定性预判需纳入司法视角。
权利边界精细化：从养老院转播版权豁免到二手商品防伪指南，监管机构在强化保护的同时，通过具体场景界定权利边界，防止IP权利过度扩张阻碍流通。
implications: 中国企业在欧应对SEP纠纷时，需重新评估诉讼策略，积极利用仲裁机制以降低禁令风险及许可成本。
针对UPC举证责任转移规则，企业应加强内部技术文档管理，确保在信息不对称案件中能有效掌控关键证据。
关注EPO无纸化及修改依据强制要求，优化欧洲阶段进入流程，避免因形式瑕疵导致审查延误或权利丧失。
watchlist: PMAC调解服务启动后的首批案例及其对后续FRAND费率确定的参考效应

daily_report.headline_zh: UPC调解中心启用与米兰地院举证新规
daily_report.headline_en: UPC PMAC Launches; Milan Court Shifts Patent Burden of Proof
daily_report.executive_line: UPC体系迎来ADR机制落地，米兰地院在专利诉讼中调整公知常识认定及举证责任分配，显著影响侵权应对策略。
daily_report.summary_zh: 本周欧洲IP焦点集中于UPC制度完善与判例演化。PMAC正式开放，为FRAND等争议提供非诉路径。米兰地院裁定特定条件下专利文献可视为公知常识，并允许在信息不对称时转移举证责任，加重被告抗辩压力。EPO强化抗体权利要求全范围效果验证标准。英国方面，UKIPO更新软件专利审查指南，二手平台反假货成为执法新重点。

report_items.title_zh: 米兰地院裁定专利文献构成公知常识及举证责任转移
report_items.title_en: UPC Milan Local Division on Patent Literature as Common General Knowledge and Evidentiary Asymmetry
report_items.title: Milan Local Division on patent literature as common general knowledge and evidentiary asymmetry
report_items.summary_zh: 统一专利法院米兰地方法院在倍耐力诉四川远星橡胶案中明确：仅在例外情况下，系列专利文献可构成本领域技术人员公知常识。若原告提供强有力侵权初步证据，而被告掌控关键技术信息，基于证据接近原则，举证责任可重新分配。法院援引EPO上诉委员会判例及欧盟法院Kelly案判决支持上述观点。
report_items.summary_en: The UPC Milan Local Division clarified when patent literature constitutes common general knowledge and how evidentiary burdens shift in infringement proceedings. In Pirelli v Sichuan Yuanxing, the Court aligned with EPO case law, ruling that patent documents only exceptionally qualify as common general knowledge, such as when a coherent series demonstrates a generally known technique. The Court also addressed evidentiary asymmetry, confirming that proof burdens may redistribute where claimants provide strong indicia of infringement and defendants control relevant technical information. This de...
core_points_zh: 法院确认仅例外情况下专利文献可视为公知常识，如系列文件呈现连贯技术图景
若原告提供强有力侵权迹象且被告掌控关键信息，举证责任可重新分配
法院援引EPO判例及欧盟法院Kelly案，强调信息不对称下的证据效力保护
core_points_en: Patent literature qualifies as common general knowledge only in exceptional circumstances involving coherent technical series.
Evidentiary burdens may shift when claimants show strong infringement indicia and defendants control key information.
The principle of proximity of evidence supports redistributing proof obligations in cases of informational asymmetry.
report_items.insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，欧洲层面后续是否会围绕这类裁判口径给出配套安排或更明确口径。
report_items.insight_en: This judgment provides critical guidance for UPC litigation strategy regarding proof standards. It reinforces the high threshold for treating patent citations as common general knowledge while offering a procedural mechanism for rights holders facing evidentiary barriers. Practitioners should note the Court’s willingness to adjust burden-sharing based on evidence proximity, balancing initial proof requirements agains...
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Rights holders can leverage strong preliminary evidence to shift evidentiary burdens when defendants possess exclusive technical information.
Practice note: Establishing patent literature as common general knowledge requires demonstrating a coherent series of documents, not isolated citations.
What to monitor: Future UPC decisions defining the threshold for strong indicia of infringement triggering evidentiary redistribution.

report_items.title_zh: EPO决定T 0655/24：平衡抗体权利要求的结构与功能特征
report_items.title_en: EPO Decision T 0655/24: Balancing Structure and Function in Antibody Claims
report_items.title: EPO decision T 0655/24: Striking the Right Balance in Antibody Claim Drafting
report_items.summary_zh: 本文分析EPO决定T 0655/24，探讨如何在抗体权利要求中平衡结构与功能特征以确立创造性。针对仅由部分结构特征定义的权利要求易受质疑的问题，该决定展示了一种替代方案：结合有限的结构定义（如特定Fc突变）与反映技术效果的功能限制，既确保技术效果在权利要求范围内可信，又避免保护范围过窄。
report_items.summary_en: This analysis of EPO decision T 0655/24 addresses the challenge of drafting antibody claims that satisfy inventive step requirements without becoming unduly narrow. The European Patent Office requires technical effects to be credible across the entire claim scope. While defining antibodies by full variable domain sequences ensures credibility, it often restricts protection. T 0655/24 illustrates an alternative approach combining limited structural definitions, such as specific Fc mutations, with functional limitations. This method maintains claim breadth while ensuring the asserted technical e...
core_points_zh: EPO实践中，若技术效果无法在权利要求全范围内被证实可信，则不能支持创造性
T 0655/24展示了结合特定Fc突变结构定义与功能性限制的权利要求撰写方法
该方法要求Fc区不结合Fcγ受体，且血浆清除率偏差控制在特定比例内
core_points_en: Technical effects must be credible across the full claim scope to support inventive step at the EPO.
T 0655/24 combines specific Fc mutation structures with functional limits to balance breadth and credibility.
Functional parameters included non-binding of Fc gamma receptors and controlled plasma clearance rate deviations.
report_items.insight_zh: 该决定为抗体专利撰写提供了重要参考，表明在结构性限定可能导致保护范围过窄时，可通过引入精确的功能性限制来维持创造性的可信度。申请人需关注EPO对“全范围可信度”的严格审查标准，并在说明书中充分支持功能特征与结构特征的关联，以优化权利要求布局。
report_items.insight_en: For practitioners managing European antibody portfolios, T 0655/24 highlights a viable drafting strategy when full structural definition yields excessively narrow claims. By anchoring claims in specific structural mutations paired with precise functional parameters, applicants can demonstrate cross-scope credibility. This approach mitigates the risk of post-filing evidence rejection while preserving commercially rele...
insight_points_zh: EPO对抗体权利要求全范围技术效果可信度的审查标准依然严格
结合具体结构突变与功能性参数限制是应对创造性质疑的有效策略
需持续监测EPO上诉委员会在后续类似案件中对功能特征接受度的变化
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Offers a pathway to broader antibody protection where full sequence claims are too restrictive for commercial needs.
Practice note: Draft claims combining specific structural mutations with quantifiable functional limits to satisfy EPO plausibility standards.
What to monitor: Future Board of Appeal decisions testing the acceptance of similar hybrid structural-functional claiming strategies.

report_items.summary_zh: 原文正文极短，仅显示为PONS IP瓦伦西亚办公室技术转移主管Rafael López撰写的文章导语。内容提及Mojica博士因CRISPR技术贡献获誉及2020年诺贝尔化学奖背景，但未展开NGT-1植物在欧洲的具体IP权利分析或政策细节。
report_items.summary_en: This analysis by Rafael López, Head of Technology Transfer at PONS IP, frames the intellectual property rights surrounding New Genomic Techniques (NGT-1) plants as a significant geostrategic challenge for Europe. The excerpt references the scientific prominence of CRISPR technology, noting Dr. Mojica’s contributions and the 2020 Nobel Prize in Chemistry. However, the available text is limited to introductory remarks and does not provide detailed legal analysis or regulatory specifics regarding the current European framework for NGT-1 plant protection.
core_points_zh: 标题显示文章主题为NGT-1植物知识产权对欧洲构成的地缘战略挑战
作者为PONS IP瓦伦西亚办公室技术转移主管兼主任Rafael López
摘要片段提及Mojica博士因CRISPR技术贡献获誉及2020年诺贝尔化学奖背景
core_points_en: The article positions NGT-1 plant IP rights as a geostrategic issue for the European region.
Author Rafael López highlights the scientific context of CRISPR technology and related Nobel recognition.
report_items.insight_zh: 证据不足模式：原文仅提供标题和简短导语，缺乏关于NGT-1植物在欧洲具体法律地位、监管框架或专利策略的实质性事实。需等待全文发布以评估其对欧洲生物技术专利布局的实际影响。
report_items.insight_en: Evidence is limited to the article's title and introductory context. No specific legal conclusions or enforcement strategies can be derived from the available excerpt. Stakeholders should await the full publication to assess any detailed commentary on European patent eligibility or regulatory alignment for gene-edited crops.
insight_points_zh: 需关注全文是否详述欧盟对NGT-1植物的最新监管提案及其对专利适格性的影响
需观察文章是否分析CRISPR相关基础专利在欧洲的许可现状与地缘政治关联
目前信息不足以判断具体的实务操作建议或市场格局变化
insight_points_en: Client relevance: The framing suggests potential strategic shifts in how NGT-1 assets are valued or protected in Europe.
Practice note: Current text lacks substantive legal analysis; do not rely on this excerpt for filing or enforcement guidance.
What to monitor: Watch for the full article to clarify the intersection of EU regulatory proposals and IP rights for NGT-1 plants.

report_items.title: Beyond qualification: navigating life as a newly qualified Trade Mark Attorney
report_items.summary_zh: 英国特许商标律师协会（CITMA）发布文章及网络研讨会回顾，旨在指导新获得资格的商标律师适应职业生涯初期挑战。内容涵盖从理论学习到商业实践的转变，强调建立客户信任、提供具有商业背景的法律建议以及保持职业健康的重要性。
report_items.summary_en: The Chartered Institute of Trade Mark Attorneys (CITMA) publishes guidance addressing the professional transition for newly qualified trade mark attorneys. Drawing on a webinar with Barker Brettell practitioners, the resource highlights the shift from academic legal analysis to commercial advisory roles. It emphasizes that early-career professionals must move beyond identifying legal risks to providing context-aware business recommendations. Key themes include understanding client economic pressures, avoiding indecisive advice, and building trust through consistency and clarity. The guidance a...
core_points_zh: 新任律师需从单纯识别法律风险转向结合宏观微观经济压力提供商业决策支持
避免仅呈现选项而不给建议，应评估法律与商业局势以成为值得信赖的顾问
良好的客户关系建立在一致性、清晰度和诚实基础上，同时需注重个人福祉
core_points_en: New attorneys must shift from pure legal risk identification to providing commercially contextualized business decision support.
Practitioners should avoid presenting options without recommendations, instead offering clear steers based on legal and commercial assessments.
Effective client relationships rely on consistency, clarity, and honesty, alongside attention to professional wellbeing and networking.
report_items.insight_zh: 本文属于职业发展指导，强调商标律师在早期执业中需平衡法律严谨性与商业实用性。对于初级从业者而言，理解客户商业语境并提供明确导向性建议是提升专业地位的关键，而非仅停留在法律条文分析层面。
report_items.insight_en: This guidance underscores the expectation for trade mark attorneys to function as trusted commercial advisors rather than solely legal technicians. For firms and in-house teams, it highlights the importance of mentoring junior staff to deliver decisive, business-oriented counsel. Understanding the broader economic context of client instructions is presented as a critical competency for early-career development and lo...
insight_points_zh: 新执业律师需培养将法律分析转化为商业决策支持的复合能力
在提供法律咨询时，应避免中立旁观，需基于商业背景给出明确指引
持续观察行业对初级律师在客户关系管理与商业洞察力方面的具体要求

report_items.title_zh: Mondaq：UPC 专利调解与仲裁中心正式开放，或为 FRAND 和欧洲专利争议提供 ADR 路径
report_items.title_en: PMAC Opens Alongside UPC: ADR Options for European Patent Disputes
report_items.title: PMAC Operating Alongside The UPC – Will The Combination Of Conventional Patent Litigation And Alternative Dispute Resolution (ADR) Form The New Gold Standard?
report_items.summary_zh: Mondaq 转载 Bardehle Pagenberg 文章称，统一专利法院框架下的专利调解与仲裁中心（PMAC）已于 2026 年 6 月 2 日正式开放，地点设在卢布尔雅那和里斯本。文章介绍，PMAC 面向欧洲专利、单一效力专利、补充保护证书及相关争议提供调解和仲裁程序，并已通过仲裁规则和调解规则。文章认为，PMAC 可能在 FRAND 争议等场景中成为传统 UPC 诉讼之外的补充选择。
report_items.summary_en: The Patent Mediation and Arbitration Centre (PMAC) formally opened on June 2, 2026, integrating into the Unified Patent Court framework. Based in Ljubljana and Lisbon, PMAC offers mediation and arbitration for patent disputes under the UPCA. It adopted specific Arbitration and Mediation Rules in April 2026 and publishes a roster of qualified neutrals. The centre aims to provide efficient, confidential alternatives to litigation, particularly for FRAND disputes. Its jurisdiction covers unitary patents, SPCs, and related commercial disputes with a factual or legal nexus to UPC-competent matters...
core_points_zh: PMAC 于 2026 年 6 月 2 日正式开放。
其规则基础来自 UPCA、UPC 程序规则以及 PMAC 的仲裁和调解规则。
PMAC 可覆盖欧洲专利、单一效力专利、SPC 及具有联系的相关争议。
core_points_en: PMAC formally launched on June 2, 2026, offering mediation and arbitration within the UPC framework.
Jurisdiction includes unitary patents, SPCs, and related disputes with a factual or legal nexus.
New Arbitration and Mediation Rules were adopted in April 2026, alongside a published neutral roster.
report_items.insight_zh: PMAC 的启动使 UPC 体系从单纯法院诉讼扩展到更完整的争议解决组合。对 SEP/FRAND、跨境许可和商业关系仍需维持的专利争议而言，调解或仲裁可能提供更灵活、保密和可控的路径，但企业仍需评估可执行性、保全措施和与 UPC 未决诉讼的衔接。
report_items.insight_en: PMAC introduces a structured ADR pathway for rights holders seeking confidentiality and flexibility outside traditional litigation. This is particularly relevant for FRAND and licensing disputes where preserving commercial relationships is prioritized. Practitioners should evaluate PMAC’s procedural rules against ongoing UPC actions. Monitoring early case uptake will clarify how PMAC interacts with parallel court pro...
insight_points_zh: UPC 体系开始形成诉讼与 ADR 并行的制度结构。
FRAND 和许可争议可能是 PMAC 最值得关注的应用场景。
合同争议解决条款应考虑是否纳入 PMAC 路径。
insight_points_en: Client relevance: PMAC offers a confidential, flexible alternative to litigation for FRAND and licensing disputes.
Practice note: Review contract dispute clauses to consider incorporating PMAC mediation or arbitration mechanisms.
What to monitor: Early adoption rates and judicial treatment of PMAC outcomes in parallel UPC proceedings.

report_items.title_zh: 统一专利法院裁定两起摩托车轮胎专利侵权案成立
report_items.title_en: UPC Milan Finds Infringement of Two Motorcycle Tyre Patents After Exhibition Seizures
report_items.title: UPC finds infringement of two motorcycle tyres patents following international exhibition | EIP
report_items.summary_zh: 统一专利法院米兰地方法院就倍耐力起诉天津金宇集团和四川远星橡胶侵犯其EP2519412和EP3519207号专利作出判决。针对四川远星提出的无效反诉被驳回并认定侵权；天津金宇因未提交答辩状，法院作出缺席判决认定侵权。此前倍耐力已与部分共同被告达成和解。
report_items.summary_en: The Unified Patent Court Local Division in Milan ruled that Tianjin Kingtyre Group and Sichuan Yuanxing Rubber infringed Pirelli’s unitary patents EP2519412 and EP3519207. The actions followed seizure orders executed after the defendants exhibited allegedly infringing products at the 2024 EICMA motorcycle exhibition. The Court rejected Sichuan Yuanxing’s counterclaim for revocation of EP3519207 and confirmed infringement. Conversely, Tianjin Kingtyre failed to file a statement of defence, resulting in a default judgment for infringement of EP2519412 under Rules 355.1(a) and 355.3 RoP. Prior to...
core_points_zh: 米兰地方法院驳回四川远星对EP3519207的无效反诉，认定其构成专利侵权
天津金宇未按规则提交答辩状，法院依据程序规则作出缺席判决，认定其侵犯EP2519412
诉讼起因于被告在2024年11月国际摩托车展览会上展示涉嫌侵权产品，此前已执行扣押令
core_points_en: UPC Milan rejected Sichuan Yuanxing’s invalidity counterclaim and found infringement of Pirelli patent EP3519207.
Tianjin Kingtyre received a default judgment for infringing EP2519412 after failing to file a defence.
Infringement proceedings originated from seizure orders targeting products displayed at the November 2024 EICMA exhibition.
report_items.insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，欧洲层面后续是否会围绕这类裁判口径给出配套安排或更明确口径。
report_items.insight_en: These judgments illustrate the UPC’s procedural efficiency in handling exhibition-based evidence and default scenarios. Rights holders can leverage seizure orders from trade fairs to secure swift infringement findings when defendants do not engage. For practitioners, the cases highlight the critical importance of timely defensive filings to avoid default judgments and the high threshold for successfully challenging p...
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Exhibiting products at major European trade fairs carries heightened litigation risk, as seizures can rapidly lead to final infringement judgments if defences ar…
Practice note: Default judgments under Rule 355 RoP provide a streamlined path for rights holders when defendants fail to participate, emphasizing the need for rigorous service an…
What to monitor: Observe how the UPC balances provisional measures obtained at exhibitions with subsequent main proceedings, particularly regarding the standard of proof required…

report_items.title_zh: CITMA：UKIPO 发布二手时尚反假货指南，Vinted 参与支持
report_items.title_en: UK IPO Launches Guidance to Help Consumers Identify Counterfeit Second-Hand Fashion
report_items.title: UK IPO launches new guidance to help consumers spot fakes
report_items.summary_zh: CITMA 报道称，英国知识产权局发布新指南，帮助消费者在网上购买二手时尚商品时识别假货。该指南由在线平台 Vinted 支持，属于 UKIPO “Second-hand, not second best” 宣传活动的一部分。报道引用 UKIPO 研究称，过去一年在线购买二手服装的人中，四分之一曾在不知情情况下买到假货，年轻消费者在二手平台遇到假冒设计师商品的比例更高。
report_items.summary_en: The UK Intellectual Property Office has released new consumer guidance to identify counterfeit goods in the online second-hand fashion market. Developed with support from resale platform Vinted, this initiative supports the 'Second-hand, not second best' campaign addressing rising counterfeit prevalence. Recent UK IPO research indicates that one in four online second-hand clothing buyers unknowingly purchased counterfeits in the past year, with younger demographics disproportionately affected. The guidance advises consumers to verify seller profiles, scrutinize product imagery and descriptions...
core_points_zh: UKIPO 发布面向二手时尚网购的反假货消费者指南。
指南由 Vinted 支持，并纳入 UKIPO 新宣传活动。
UKIPO 研究显示二手平台假货风险正在影响消费者信任。
core_points_en: UK IPO and Vinted launched guidance to help consumers spot fakes in online second-hand fashion markets.
Research shows one in four recent online second-hand clothing buyers unknowingly purchased counterfeit items.
Guidance recommends checking seller profiles, reviewing photos, comparing labels, and using platform verification tools.
report_items.insight_zh: 该动态不是新法律规则，但对品牌执法和平台治理有现实意义。随着二手时尚市场扩大，权利人需要把 resale 平台监测、卖家画像、平台验证工具和消费者教育纳入反假货策略，而不是只依赖传统下架投诉。
report_items.insight_en: This initiative highlights the strategic shift toward consumer education and platform collaboration in anti-counterfeiting efforts. For rights holders, it underscores the necessity of integrating resale platforms into brand protection strategies beyond traditional takedown mechanisms. Monitoring how platforms implement verification tools and how consumers respond to these educational resources will be critical for as...
insight_points_zh: 二手平台已成为英国反假货执法和消费者教育的新重点。
品牌方应将 resale 平台纳入常规监测范围。
平台验证和买家保护工具会成为反假货治理的重要证据来源。
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Rights holders should align internal brand protection strategies with emerging consumer education initiatives on resale platforms.
Practice note: Effective anti-counterfeiting now requires monitoring secondary markets and leveraging platform-specific verification and buyer protection tools.
What to monitor: Track adoption rates of verification tools and consumer sentiment shifts regarding trust in second-hand fashion marketplaces.

report_items.title_zh: Kluwer：欧盟版权改革进入新阶段，委员会双重咨询勾勒未来议题
report_items.title_en: EU Copyright Reform Advances via Twin Commission Consultations on CDSM Review
report_items.title: Europe’s next copyright reform moves a step closer to reality: what can we tell from the twin Commission consultations?
report_items.summary_zh: Kluwer Copyright Blog 分析欧盟委员会围绕版权政策启动的两项咨询，认为这标志着欧盟未来版权改革进入新阶段。文章指出，虽然《数字单一市场版权指令》允许委员会不早于 2026 年 6 月才进行审查，但委员会已迅速启动相关程序。咨询材料显示，未来改革可能以“增强欧洲创造力和创新版权环境”的定向倡议形式推进，关注 AI、体育赛事盗版、表演者报酬和研究等议题。
report_items.summary_en: The European Commission has launched twin consultations to review the Copyright in the Digital Single Market Directive, moving promptly despite provisions allowing delay until June 2026. This initiative signals a new phase in EU copyright policy, aiming to address evolving production and usage patterns without adopting broad fair use principles. The process includes an implementation survey and a Call for Evidence targeting specific issues such as artificial intelligence, sports event piracy, performer remuneration, and research exceptions. While the consultations primarily gather information...
core_points_zh: 欧盟委员会启动两项版权相关咨询，开启 CDSM 指令后续审查进程。
潜在改革被描述为定向倡议，而非全面重写欧盟版权体系。
咨询议题包括 AI、体育赛事盗版、表演者报酬和研究使用。
core_points_en: Commission launches twin consultations to review CDSM Directive implementation and future reform needs.
Reform approach remains targeted, addressing AI, sports piracy, performer pay, and research issues.
Consultations prioritize data gathering, with clear legislative directions expected later this year or next.
report_items.insight_zh: 这条信号说明欧盟版权政策已从 AI 单点争议扩展到更广的制度校准。内容平台、权利人、研究机构和 AI 服务商都应关注咨询问题如何转化为立法文本，尤其是训练数据、授权透明度、体育转播保护和跨境报酬规则。
report_items.insight_en: Rights holders and technology companies should note the Commission’s preference for targeted amendments over comprehensive copyright overhaul. The inclusion of AI and sports piracy indicates priority areas for regulatory adjustment. Stakeholders must engage with the Call for Evidence to shape upcoming legislative proposals, particularly regarding data training and cross-border remuneration mechanisms.
insight_points_zh: 欧盟版权改革可能采取多议题、定向修补方式。
AI 与版权的关系仍是核心，但不是唯一政策对象。
企业应尽早准备咨询回应和政策影响评估。
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Companies in AI, sports media, and content licensing face potential regulatory changes affecting data usage and revenue distribution models.
Practice note: Legal teams should prepare evidence-based responses to the Call for Evidence, focusing on practical impacts of current CDSM Directive provisions.
What to monitor: Track how consultation feedback influences the provisional ‘Directive enhancing the copyright environment’ and subsequent legislative drafts.

report_items.title_zh: 统一专利法院：重新审视创造性评估
report_items.title_en: UPC Court of Appeal: Emerging Methodology for Assessing Inventive Step
report_items.title: UPC: Rethinking inventive step - GJE
report_items.summary_zh: 随着统一专利法院诉讼加速，其上诉庭近期判决正塑造创造性评估标准。文章总结UPC新兴方法，指出其与欧洲专利局框架的差异，并探讨这些差异对专利撰写、审查及诉讼策略的影响。
report_items.summary_en: As litigation before the Unified Patent Court accelerates, recent Court of Appeal decisions are defining the assessment of core patentability issues, particularly inventive step. While this concept is familiar to practitioners, the UPC is developing a distinct methodology that differs from the European Patent Office framework. This analysis summarizes the emerging judicial approach, highlighting key divergences from EPO practice. It further considers how these differences may influence patent drafting, prosecution, and litigation strategies within the UPC system. Rights holders and counsel mus...
core_points_zh: 统一专利法院上诉庭近期判决正在定义该平台核心可专利性问题的评估方式
创造性概念虽熟悉，但在统一专利法院受制于独特且不断发展的方法论
文章旨在总结UPC新兴方法，并highlight其与欧洲专利局框架的具体差异
core_points_en: UPC Court of Appeal decisions are shaping the specific assessment standards for inventive step in ongoing litigation.
The UPC is developing a distinct methodology for inventive step that diverges from established EPO frameworks.
These judicial differences impact patent drafting, prosecution strategies, and litigation approaches before the Unified Patent Court.
report_items.insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，欧洲层面后续是否会围绕这类规则动态给出配套安排或更明确口径。
report_items.insight_en: Practitioners should note that UPC inventive step assessment is not identical to EPO examination practice. Recent appellate rulings indicate a developing judicial standard that requires adjusted argumentation strategies. Monitoring these precedents is essential for accurate validity forecasting and effective portfolio management in the unitary patent system.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Divergence from EPO practice means prior validity opinions may require reassessment for UPC enforcement or defense purposes.
Practice note: Litigation and prosecution teams must adapt technical arguments to align with the UPC’s emerging, distinct inventive step methodology.
What to monitor: Track subsequent Court of Appeal judgments to identify consistent patterns in how technical problems and solutions are evaluated.

report_items.title_zh: GJE：Emotional Perception 案后 UKIPO 再发审查报告，英国软件专利性口径继续演化
report_items.title_en: UKIPO Issues New Examination Report Following Emotional Perception Supreme Court Decision
report_items.title: Emotional Perception – the story continues - GJE
report_items.summary_zh: GJE 文章称，UKIPO 在长期受到关注的 Emotional Perception 案中发布了最新审查报告。文章回顾，英国最高法院 2026 年 2 月的判决放弃了沿用约 20 年的 Aerotel 方法，并使英国对计算机程序排除可专利性的分析更接近 EPO 的“any hardware”路径。最新审查报告显示，该案在最高法院判决后仍会继续影响英国软件、AI 和计算机实现发明的审查实践。
report_items.summary_en: The UK Intellectual Property Office has issued its latest examination report in the long-running Emotional Perception case. This development follows the UK Supreme Court’s February decision, which abandoned the twenty-year-old Aerotel approach for assessing computer program patentability exclusions. By discarding this precedent, the Court aligned the UK framework with the European Patent Office’s “any hardware” approach. The new report indicates how examiners are applying these revised standards to pending applications. This marks a significant shift in UK practice, moving away from establishe...
core_points_zh: UKIPO 在 Emotional Perception 案后发布新的审查报告。
英国最高法院此前放弃 Aerotel 方法，并向 EPO 的 any hardware 路径靠拢。
该案继续影响英国对软件和 AI 相关发明可专利性的判断。
core_points_en: UKIPO issued a new examination report in the Emotional Perception case following recent Supreme Court rulings.
The Supreme Court abandoned the Aerotel approach, aligning UK patentability tests with the EPO any hardware method.
The updated report demonstrates how examiners apply the new standards to computer-implemented inventions.
report_items.insight_zh: 这条动态对在英国和欧洲同步布局软件、AI 或计算机实现发明的申请人有直接参考价值。短期内，申请策略需要同时跟踪 UKIPO 审查报告、英国法院后续处理和 EPO 实务，以避免英国说明书与权利要求写法落后于新口径。
report_items.insight_en: This update confirms the practical implementation of the Supreme Court’s shift toward EPO-aligned patentability standards. Rights holders should note that UK examination practice now diverges significantly from historical precedents. Portfolio managers must ensure that claim drafting and technical contribution arguments reflect the “any hardware” test rather than the former Aerotel framework. Monitoring ongoing UKIPO...
insight_points_zh: 英国软件专利性测试正在经历实质性重构。
UKIPO 审查报告将影响申请撰写和审查答复策略。
跨英国和 EPO 的申请组合需要重新校准技术贡献表述。
insight_points_en: Client relevance: UK patentability assessment for software and AI now aligns with EPO standards, requiring updated portfolio strategies.
Practice note: Drafting and prosecution arguments must pivot from Aerotel precedents to the adopted any hardware approach.
What to monitor: Subsequent UKIPO examination reports and guidance to clarify the scope of the new patentability test.

weekly_report.headline_zh: UPC机制成型：ADR开放与长臂管辖澄清
weekly_report.headline_en: UPC Matures: ADR Launch and Long-Arm Clarity
weekly_report.executive_line: UPC调解仲裁中心正式运营，上诉庭厘清跨境管辖权；EPO与UKIPO在软件及生物专利审查上出现口径分化，IP资产金融化在英国加速落地。
weekly_report.summary_zh: 本周欧洲IP体系呈现“制度完善”与“审查分化”双轨态势。UPC方面，PMAC正式开放提供ADR新路径，上诉庭在Fujifilm案中确立长臂管辖框架，米兰地院强化举证责任分配，诉讼生态趋于成熟。审查层面，EPO通过G 1/26转介统一权利要求解释标准，严格抗体创造性审查；而英国UKIPO紧随最高法院判例，向“任何硬件”标准靠拢，软化软件专利门槛。此外，苏格兰推出IP担保贷款，标志IP正式进入主流商业融资视野。

report_items.title_zh: 米兰地院裁定专利文献构成公知常识及举证责任转移
report_items.title_en: UPC Milan Local Division on Patent Literature as Common General Knowledge and Evidentiary Asymmetry
report_items.title: Milan Local Division on patent literature as common general knowledge and evidentiary asymmetry
report_items.summary_zh: 统一专利法院米兰地方法院在倍耐力诉四川远星橡胶案中明确：仅在例外情况下，系列专利文献可构成本领域技术人员公知常识。若原告提供强有力侵权初步证据，而被告掌控关键技术信息，基于证据接近原则，举证责任可重新分配。法院援引EPO上诉委员会判例及欧盟法院Kelly案判决支持上述观点。
report_items.summary_en: The UPC Milan Local Division clarified when patent literature constitutes common general knowledge and how evidentiary burdens shift in infringement proceedings. In Pirelli v Sichuan Yuanxing, the Court aligned with EPO case law, ruling that patent documents only exceptionally qualify as common general knowledge, such as when a coherent series demonstrates a generally known technique. The Court also addressed evidentiary asymmetry, confirming that proof burdens may redistribute where claimants provide strong indicia of infringement and defendants control relevant technical information. This de...
core_points_zh: 法院确认仅例外情况下专利文献可视为公知常识，如系列文件呈现连贯技术图景
若原告提供强有力侵权迹象且被告掌控关键信息，举证责任可重新分配
法院援引EPO判例及欧盟法院Kelly案，强调信息不对称下的证据效力保护
core_points_en: Patent literature qualifies as common general knowledge only in exceptional circumstances involving coherent technical series.
Evidentiary burdens may shift when claimants show strong infringement indicia and defendants control key information.
The principle of proximity of evidence supports redistributing proof obligations in cases of informational asymmetry.
report_items.insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，欧洲层面后续是否会围绕这类裁判口径给出配套安排或更明确口径。
report_items.insight_en: This judgment provides critical guidance for UPC litigation strategy regarding proof standards. It reinforces the high threshold for treating patent citations as common general knowledge while offering a procedural mechanism for rights holders facing evidentiary barriers. Practitioners should note the Court’s willingness to adjust burden-sharing based on evidence proximity, balancing initial proof requirements agains...
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Rights holders can leverage strong preliminary evidence to shift evidentiary burdens when defendants possess exclusive technical information.
Practice note: Establishing patent literature as common general knowledge requires demonstrating a coherent series of documents, not isolated citations.
What to monitor: Future UPC decisions defining the threshold for strong indicia of infringement triggering evidentiary redistribution.

report_items.title_zh: EPO决定T 0655/24：平衡抗体权利要求的结构与功能特征
report_items.title_en: EPO Decision T 0655/24: Balancing Structure and Function in Antibody Claims
report_items.title: EPO decision T 0655/24: Striking the Right Balance in Antibody Claim Drafting
report_items.summary_zh: 本文分析EPO决定T 0655/24，探讨如何在抗体权利要求中平衡结构与功能特征以确立创造性。针对仅由部分结构特征定义的权利要求易受质疑的问题，该决定展示了一种替代方案：结合有限的结构定义（如特定Fc突变）与反映技术效果的功能限制，既确保技术效果在权利要求范围内可信，又避免保护范围过窄。
report_items.summary_en: This analysis of EPO decision T 0655/24 addresses the challenge of drafting antibody claims that satisfy inventive step requirements without becoming unduly narrow. The European Patent Office requires technical effects to be credible across the entire claim scope. While defining antibodies by full variable domain sequences ensures credibility, it often restricts protection. T 0655/24 illustrates an alternative approach combining limited structural definitions, such as specific Fc mutations, with functional limitations. This method maintains claim breadth while ensuring the asserted technical e...
core_points_zh: EPO实践中，若技术效果无法在权利要求全范围内被证实可信，则不能支持创造性
T 0655/24展示了结合特定Fc突变结构定义与功能性限制的权利要求撰写方法
该方法要求Fc区不结合Fcγ受体，且血浆清除率偏差控制在特定比例内
core_points_en: Technical effects must be credible across the full claim scope to support inventive step at the EPO.
T 0655/24 combines specific Fc mutation structures with functional limits to balance breadth and credibility.
Functional parameters included non-binding of Fc gamma receptors and controlled plasma clearance rate deviations.
report_items.insight_zh: 该决定为抗体专利撰写提供了重要参考，表明在结构性限定可能导致保护范围过窄时，可通过引入精确的功能性限制来维持创造性的可信度。申请人需关注EPO对“全范围可信度”的严格审查标准，并在说明书中充分支持功能特征与结构特征的关联，以优化权利要求布局。
report_items.insight_en: For practitioners managing European antibody portfolios, T 0655/24 highlights a viable drafting strategy when full structural definition yields excessively narrow claims. By anchoring claims in specific structural mutations paired with precise functional parameters, applicants can demonstrate cross-scope credibility. This approach mitigates the risk of post-filing evidence rejection while preserving commercially rele...
insight_points_zh: EPO对抗体权利要求全范围技术效果可信度的审查标准依然严格
结合具体结构突变与功能性参数限制是应对创造性质疑的有效策略
需持续监测EPO上诉委员会在后续类似案件中对功能特征接受度的变化
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Offers a pathway to broader antibody protection where full sequence claims are too restrictive for commercial needs.
Practice note: Draft claims combining specific structural mutations with quantifiable functional limits to satisfy EPO plausibility standards.
What to monitor: Future Board of Appeal decisions testing the acceptance of similar hybrid structural-functional claiming strategies.

report_items.title_zh: NGT-1植物知识产权：欧洲的地缘战略挑战
report_items.title_en: Intellectual Property Rights of NGT-1 Plants: A Geostrategic Challenge for Europe
report_items.title: The Intellectual Property Rights of NGT-1 plants: a geostrategic challenge for Europe
report_items.summary_zh: 原文正文极短，仅显示为PONS IP瓦伦西亚办公室技术转移主管Rafael López撰写的文章导语。内容提及Mojica博士因CRISPR技术贡献获誉及2020年诺贝尔化学奖背景，但未展开NGT-1植物在欧洲的具体IP权利分析或政策细节。
report_items.summary_en: This analysis by Rafael López, Head of Technology Transfer at PONS IP, frames the intellectual property rights surrounding New Genomic Techniques (NGT-1) plants as a significant geostrategic challenge for Europe. The excerpt references the scientific prominence of CRISPR technology, noting Dr. Mojica’s contributions and the 2020 Nobel Prize in Chemistry. However, the available text is limited to introductory remarks and does not provide detailed legal analysis or regulatory specifics regarding the current European framework for NGT-1 plant protection.
core_points_zh: 标题显示文章主题为NGT-1植物知识产权对欧洲构成的地缘战略挑战
作者为PONS IP瓦伦西亚办公室技术转移主管兼主任Rafael López
摘要片段提及Mojica博士因CRISPR技术贡献获誉及2020年诺贝尔化学奖背景
core_points_en: The article positions NGT-1 plant IP rights as a geostrategic issue for the European region.
Author Rafael López highlights the scientific context of CRISPR technology and related Nobel recognition.
report_items.insight_zh: 证据不足模式：原文仅提供标题和简短导语，缺乏关于NGT-1植物在欧洲具体法律地位、监管框架或专利策略的实质性事实。需等待全文发布以评估其对欧洲生物技术专利布局的实际影响。
report_items.insight_en: Evidence is limited to the article's title and introductory context. No specific legal conclusions or enforcement strategies can be derived from the available excerpt. Stakeholders should await the full publication to assess any detailed commentary on European patent eligibility or regulatory alignment for gene-edited crops.
insight_points_zh: 需关注全文是否详述欧盟对NGT-1植物的最新监管提案及其对专利适格性的影响
需观察文章是否分析CRISPR相关基础专利在欧洲的许可现状与地缘政治关联
目前信息不足以判断具体的实务操作建议或市场格局变化
insight_points_en: Client relevance: The framing suggests potential strategic shifts in how NGT-1 assets are valued or protected in Europe.
Practice note: Current text lacks substantive legal analysis; do not rely on this excerpt for filing or enforcement guidance.
What to monitor: Watch for the full article to clarify the intersection of EU regulatory proposals and IP rights for NGT-1 plants.

report_items.title_en: CITMA Guidance on Transitioning from Qualification to Practice for New Trade Mark Attorneys
report_items.title: Beyond qualification: navigating life as a newly qualified Trade Mark Attorney
report_items.summary_zh: 英国特许商标律师协会（CITMA）发布文章及网络研讨会回顾，旨在指导新获得资格的商标律师适应职业生涯初期挑战。内容涵盖从理论学习到商业实践的转变，强调建立客户信任、提供具有商业背景的法律建议以及保持职业健康的重要性。
report_items.summary_en: The Chartered Institute of Trade Mark Attorneys (CITMA) publishes guidance addressing the professional transition for newly qualified trade mark attorneys. Drawing on a webinar with Barker Brettell practitioners, the resource highlights the shift from academic legal analysis to commercial advisory roles. It emphasizes that early-career professionals must move beyond identifying legal risks to providing context-aware business recommendations. Key themes include understanding client economic pressures, avoiding indecisive advice, and building trust through consistency and clarity. The guidance a...
core_points_zh: 新任律师需从单纯识别法律风险转向结合宏观微观经济压力提供商业决策支持
避免仅呈现选项而不给建议，应评估法律与商业局势以成为值得信赖的顾问
良好的客户关系建立在一致性、清晰度和诚实基础上，同时需注重个人福祉
core_points_en: New attorneys must shift from pure legal risk identification to providing commercially contextualized business decision support.
Practitioners should avoid presenting options without recommendations, instead offering clear steers based on legal and commercial assessments.
Effective client relationships rely on consistency, clarity, and honesty, alongside attention to professional wellbeing and networking.
report_items.insight_zh: 本文属于职业发展指导，强调商标律师在早期执业中需平衡法律严谨性与商业实用性。对于初级从业者而言，理解客户商业语境并提供明确导向性建议是提升专业地位的关键，而非仅停留在法律条文分析层面。
report_items.insight_en: This guidance underscores the expectation for trade mark attorneys to function as trusted commercial advisors rather than solely legal technicians. For firms and in-house teams, it highlights the importance of mentoring junior staff to deliver decisive, business-oriented counsel. Understanding the broader economic context of client instructions is presented as a critical competency for early-career development and lo...
insight_points_zh: 新执业律师需培养将法律分析转化为商业决策支持的复合能力
在提供法律咨询时，应避免中立旁观，需基于商业背景给出明确指引
持续观察行业对初级律师在客户关系管理与商业洞察力方面的具体要求

Practice note: Junior practitioners should be trained to assess macro- and micro-economic factors affecting clients, ensuring recommendations are grounded in both legal validity a…
What to monitor: Observe how professional bodies like CITMA define evolving competency standards for newly qualified attorneys, particularly regarding commercial acumen and client…

report_items.title_zh: Mondaq：UPC 专利调解与仲裁中心正式开放，或为 FRAND 和欧洲专利争议提供 ADR 路径
report_items.title_en: PMAC Opens Alongside UPC: ADR Options for European Patent Disputes
report_items.title: PMAC Operating Alongside The UPC – Will The Combination Of Conventional Patent Litigation And Alternative Dispute Resolution (ADR) Form The New Gold Standard?
report_items.summary_zh: Mondaq 转载 Bardehle Pagenberg 文章称，统一专利法院框架下的专利调解与仲裁中心（PMAC）已于 2026 年 6 月 2 日正式开放，地点设在卢布尔雅那和里斯本。文章介绍，PMAC 面向欧洲专利、单一效力专利、补充保护证书及相关争议提供调解和仲裁程序，并已通过仲裁规则和调解规则。文章认为，PMAC 可能在 FRAND 争议等场景中成为传统 UPC 诉讼之外的补充选择。
report_items.summary_en: The Patent Mediation and Arbitration Centre (PMAC) formally opened on June 2, 2026, integrating into the Unified Patent Court framework. Based in Ljubljana and Lisbon, PMAC offers mediation and arbitration for patent disputes under the UPCA. It adopted specific Arbitration and Mediation Rules in April 2026 and publishes a roster of qualified neutrals. The centre aims to provide efficient, confidential alternatives to litigation, particularly for FRAND disputes. Its jurisdiction covers unitary patents, SPCs, and related commercial disputes with a factual or legal nexus to UPC-competent matters...
core_points_zh: PMAC 于 2026 年 6 月 2 日正式开放。
其规则基础来自 UPCA、UPC 程序规则以及 PMAC 的仲裁和调解规则。
PMAC 可覆盖欧洲专利、单一效力专利、SPC 及具有联系的相关争议。
core_points_en: PMAC formally launched on June 2, 2026, offering mediation and arbitration within the UPC framework.
Jurisdiction includes unitary patents, SPCs, and related disputes with a factual or legal nexus.
New Arbitration and Mediation Rules were adopted in April 2026, alongside a published neutral roster.
report_items.insight_zh: PMAC 的启动使 UPC 体系从单纯法院诉讼扩展到更完整的争议解决组合。对 SEP/FRAND、跨境许可和商业关系仍需维持的专利争议而言，调解或仲裁可能提供更灵活、保密和可控的路径，但企业仍需评估可执行性、保全措施和与 UPC 未决诉讼的衔接。
report_items.insight_en: PMAC introduces a structured ADR pathway for rights holders seeking confidentiality and flexibility outside traditional litigation. This is particularly relevant for FRAND and licensing disputes where preserving commercial relationships is prioritized. Practitioners should evaluate PMAC’s procedural rules against ongoing UPC actions. Monitoring early case uptake will clarify how PMAC interacts with parallel court pro...
insight_points_zh: UPC 体系开始形成诉讼与 ADR 并行的制度结构。
FRAND 和许可争议可能是 PMAC 最值得关注的应用场景。
合同争议解决条款应考虑是否纳入 PMAC 路径。
insight_points_en: Client relevance: PMAC offers a confidential, flexible alternative to litigation for FRAND and licensing disputes.
Practice note: Review contract dispute clauses to consider incorporating PMAC mediation or arbitration mechanisms.
What to monitor: Early adoption rates and judicial treatment of PMAC outcomes in parallel UPC proceedings.

report_items.title: UPC finds infringement of two motorcycle tyres patents following international exhibition | EIP

report_items.summary_en: The Unified Patent Court Local Division in Milan ruled that Tianjin Kingtyre Group and Sichuan Yuanxing Rubber infringed Pirelli’s unitary patents EP2519412 and EP3519207. The actions followed seizure orders executed after the defendants exhibited allegedly infringing products at the 2024 EICMA motorcycle exhibition. The Court rejected Sichuan Yuanxing’s counterclaim for revocation of EP3519207 and confirmed infringement. Conversely, Tianjin Kingtyre failed to file a statement of defence, resulting in a default judgment for infringement of EP2519412 under Rules 355.1(a) and 355.3 RoP. Prior to...
core_points_zh: 米兰地方法院驳回四川远星对EP3519207的无效反诉，认定其构成专利侵权
天津金宇未按规则提交答辩状，法院依据程序规则作出缺席判决，认定其侵犯EP2519412
诉讼起因于被告在2024年11月国际摩托车展览会上展示涉嫌侵权产品，此前已执行扣押令
core_points_en: UPC Milan rejected Sichuan Yuanxing’s invalidity counterclaim and found infringement of Pirelli patent EP3519207.
Tianjin Kingtyre received a default judgment for infringing EP2519412 after failing to file a defence.
Infringement proceedings originated from seizure orders targeting products displayed at the November 2024 EICMA exhibition.
report_items.insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，欧洲层面后续是否会围绕这类裁判口径给出配套安排或更明确口径。
report_items.insight_en: These judgments illustrate the UPC’s procedural efficiency in handling exhibition-based evidence and default scenarios. Rights holders can leverage seizure orders from trade fairs to secure swift infringement findings when defendants do not engage. For practitioners, the cases highlight the critical importance of timely defensive filings to avoid default judgments and the high threshold for successfully challenging p...
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Exhibiting products at major European trade fairs carries heightened litigation risk, as seizures can rapidly lead to final infringement judgments if defences ar…
Practice note: Default judgments under Rule 355 RoP provide a streamlined path for rights holders when defendants fail to participate, emphasizing the need for rigorous service an…
What to monitor: Observe how the UPC balances provisional measures obtained at exhibitions with subsequent main proceedings, particularly regarding the standard of proof required…

report_items.title_zh: CITMA：UKIPO 发布二手时尚反假货指南，Vinted 参与支持
report_items.title_en: UK IPO Launches Guidance to Help Consumers Identify Counterfeit Second-Hand Fashion
report_items.title: UK IPO launches new guidance to help consumers spot fakes
report_items.summary_zh: CITMA 报道称，英国知识产权局发布新指南，帮助消费者在网上购买二手时尚商品时识别假货。该指南由在线平台 Vinted 支持，属于 UKIPO “Second-hand, not second best” 宣传活动的一部分。报道引用 UKIPO 研究称，过去一年在线购买二手服装的人中，四分之一曾在不知情情况下买到假货，年轻消费者在二手平台遇到假冒设计师商品的比例更高。
report_items.summary_en: The UK Intellectual Property Office has released new consumer guidance to identify counterfeit goods in the online second-hand fashion market. Developed with support from resale platform Vinted, this initiative supports the 'Second-hand, not second best' campaign addressing rising counterfeit prevalence. Recent UK IPO research indicates that one in four online second-hand clothing buyers unknowingly purchased counterfeits in the past year, with younger demographics disproportionately affected. The guidance advises consumers to verify seller profiles, scrutinize product imagery and descriptions...
core_points_zh: UKIPO 发布面向二手时尚网购的反假货消费者指南。
指南由 Vinted 支持，并纳入 UKIPO 新宣传活动。
UKIPO 研究显示二手平台假货风险正在影响消费者信任。
core_points_en: UK IPO and Vinted launched guidance to help consumers spot fakes in online second-hand fashion markets.
Research shows one in four recent online second-hand clothing buyers unknowingly purchased counterfeit items.
Guidance recommends checking seller profiles, reviewing photos, comparing labels, and using platform verification tools.
report_items.insight_zh: 该动态不是新法律规则，但对品牌执法和平台治理有现实意义。随着二手时尚市场扩大，权利人需要把 resale 平台监测、卖家画像、平台验证工具和消费者教育纳入反假货策略，而不是只依赖传统下架投诉。
report_items.insight_en: This initiative highlights the strategic shift toward consumer education and platform collaboration in anti-counterfeiting efforts. For rights holders, it underscores the necessity of integrating resale platforms into brand protection strategies beyond traditional takedown mechanisms. Monitoring how platforms implement verification tools and how consumers respond to these educational resources will be critical for as...
insight_points_zh: 二手平台已成为英国反假货执法和消费者教育的新重点。
品牌方应将 resale 平台纳入常规监测范围。
平台验证和买家保护工具会成为反假货治理的重要证据来源。
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Rights holders should align internal brand protection strategies with emerging consumer education initiatives on resale platforms.
Practice note: Effective anti-counterfeiting now requires monitoring secondary markets and leveraging platform-specific verification and buyer protection tools.
What to monitor: Track adoption rates of verification tools and consumer sentiment shifts regarding trust in second-hand fashion marketplaces.

report_items.title_zh: Kluwer：欧盟版权改革进入新阶段，委员会双重咨询勾勒未来议题
report_items.title_en: EU Copyright Reform Advances via Twin Commission Consultations on CDSM Review
report_items.title: Europe’s next copyright reform moves a step closer to reality: what can we tell from the twin Commission consultations?
report_items.summary_zh: Kluwer Copyright Blog 分析欧盟委员会围绕版权政策启动的两项咨询，认为这标志着欧盟未来版权改革进入新阶段。文章指出，虽然《数字单一市场版权指令》允许委员会不早于 2026 年 6 月才进行审查，但委员会已迅速启动相关程序。咨询材料显示，未来改革可能以“增强欧洲创造力和创新版权环境”的定向倡议形式推进，关注 AI、体育赛事盗版、表演者报酬和研究等议题。
report_items.summary_en: The European Commission has launched twin consultations to review the Copyright in the Digital Single Market Directive, moving promptly despite provisions allowing delay until June 2026. This initiative signals a new phase in EU copyright policy, aiming to address evolving production and usage patterns without adopting broad fair use principles. The process includes an implementation survey and a Call for Evidence targeting specific issues such as artificial intelligence, sports event piracy, performer remuneration, and research exceptions. While the consultations primarily gather information...
core_points_zh: 欧盟委员会启动两项版权相关咨询，开启 CDSM 指令后续审查进程。
潜在改革被描述为定向倡议，而非全面重写欧盟版权体系。
咨询议题包括 AI、体育赛事盗版、表演者报酬和研究使用。
core_points_en: Commission launches twin consultations to review CDSM Directive implementation and future reform needs.
Reform approach remains targeted, addressing AI, sports piracy, performer pay, and research issues.
Consultations prioritize data gathering, with clear legislative directions expected later this year or next.
report_items.insight_zh: 这条信号说明欧盟版权政策已从 AI 单点争议扩展到更广的制度校准。内容平台、权利人、研究机构和 AI 服务商都应关注咨询问题如何转化为立法文本，尤其是训练数据、授权透明度、体育转播保护和跨境报酬规则。
report_items.insight_en: Rights holders and technology companies should note the Commission’s preference for targeted amendments over comprehensive copyright overhaul. The inclusion of AI and sports piracy indicates priority areas for regulatory adjustment. Stakeholders must engage with the Call for Evidence to shape upcoming legislative proposals, particularly regarding data training and cross-border remuneration mechanisms.
insight_points_zh: 欧盟版权改革可能采取多议题、定向修补方式。
AI 与版权的关系仍是核心，但不是唯一政策对象。
企业应尽早准备咨询回应和政策影响评估。
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Companies in AI, sports media, and content licensing face potential regulatory changes affecting data usage and revenue distribution models.
Practice note: Legal teams should prepare evidence-based responses to the Call for Evidence, focusing on practical impacts of current CDSM Directive provisions.
What to monitor: Track how consultation feedback influences the provisional ‘Directive enhancing the copyright environment’ and subsequent legislative drafts.

report_items.title: UPC: Rethinking inventive step - GJE
report_items.summary_zh: 随着统一专利法院诉讼加速，其上诉庭近期判决正塑造创造性评估标准。文章总结UPC新兴方法，指出其与欧洲专利局框架的差异，并探讨这些差异对专利撰写、审查及诉讼策略的影响。
report_items.summary_en: As litigation before the Unified Patent Court accelerates, recent Court of Appeal decisions are defining the assessment of core patentability issues, particularly inventive step. While this concept is familiar to practitioners, the UPC is developing a distinct methodology that differs from the European Patent Office framework. This analysis summarizes the emerging judicial approach, highlighting key divergences from EPO practice. It further considers how these differences may influence patent drafting, prosecution, and litigation strategies within the UPC system. Rights holders and counsel mus...
core_points_zh: 统一专利法院上诉庭近期判决正在定义该平台核心可专利性问题的评估方式
创造性概念虽熟悉，但在统一专利法院受制于独特且不断发展的方法论
文章旨在总结UPC新兴方法，并highlight其与欧洲专利局框架的具体差异
core_points_en: UPC Court of Appeal decisions are shaping the specific assessment standards for inventive step in ongoing litigation.
The UPC is developing a distinct methodology for inventive step that diverges from established EPO frameworks.
These judicial differences impact patent drafting, prosecution strategies, and litigation approaches before the Unified Patent Court.
report_items.insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，欧洲层面后续是否会围绕这类规则动态给出配套安排或更明确口径。
report_items.insight_en: Practitioners should note that UPC inventive step assessment is not identical to EPO examination practice. Recent appellate rulings indicate a developing judicial standard that requires adjusted argumentation strategies. Monitoring these precedents is essential for accurate validity forecasting and effective portfolio management in the unitary patent system.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Divergence from EPO practice means prior validity opinions may require reassessment for UPC enforcement or defense purposes.
Practice note: Litigation and prosecution teams must adapt technical arguments to align with the UPC’s emerging, distinct inventive step methodology.
What to monitor: Track subsequent Court of Appeal judgments to identify consistent patterns in how technical problems and solutions are evaluated.

report_items.title_en: UKIPO Issues New Examination Report Following Emotional Perception Supreme Court Decision
report_items.title: Emotional Perception – the story continues - GJE
report_items.summary_zh: GJE 文章称，UKIPO 在长期受到关注的 Emotional Perception 案中发布了最新审查报告。文章回顾，英国最高法院 2026 年 2 月的判决放弃了沿用约 20 年的 Aerotel 方法，并使英国对计算机程序排除可专利性的分析更接近 EPO 的“any hardware”路径。最新审查报告显示，该案在最高法院判决后仍会继续影响英国软件、AI 和计算机实现发明的审查实践。
report_items.summary_en: The UK Intellectual Property Office has issued its latest examination report in the long-running Emotional Perception case. This development follows the UK Supreme Court’s February decision, which abandoned the twenty-year-old Aerotel approach for assessing computer program patentability exclusions. By discarding this precedent, the Court aligned the UK framework with the European Patent Office’s “any hardware” approach. The new report indicates how examiners are applying these revised standards to pending applications. This marks a significant shift in UK practice, moving away from establishe...
core_points_zh: UKIPO 在 Emotional Perception 案后发布新的审查报告。
英国最高法院此前放弃 Aerotel 方法，并向 EPO 的 any hardware 路径靠拢。
该案继续影响英国对软件和 AI 相关发明可专利性的判断。
core_points_en: UKIPO issued a new examination report in the Emotional Perception case following recent Supreme Court rulings.
The Supreme Court abandoned the Aerotel approach, aligning UK patentability tests with the EPO any hardware method.
The updated report demonstrates how examiners apply the new standards to computer-implemented inventions.
report_items.insight_zh: 这条动态对在英国和欧洲同步布局软件、AI 或计算机实现发明的申请人有直接参考价值。短期内，申请策略需要同时跟踪 UKIPO 审查报告、英国法院后续处理和 EPO 实务，以避免英国说明书与权利要求写法落后于新口径。
report_items.insight_en: This update confirms the practical implementation of the Supreme Court’s shift toward EPO-aligned patentability standards. Rights holders should note that UK examination practice now diverges significantly from historical precedents. Portfolio managers must ensure that claim drafting and technical contribution arguments reflect the “any hardware” test rather than the former Aerotel framework. Monitoring ongoing UKIPO...
insight_points_zh: 英国软件专利性测试正在经历实质性重构。
UKIPO 审查报告将影响申请撰写和审查答复策略。
跨英国和 EPO 的申请组合需要重新校准技术贡献表述。
insight_points_en: Client relevance: UK patentability assessment for software and AI now aligns with EPO standards, requiring updated portfolio strategies.
Practice note: Drafting and prosecution arguments must pivot from Aerotel precedents to the adopted any hardware approach.
What to monitor: Subsequent UKIPO examination reports and guidance to clarify the scope of the new patentability test.

daily_audio_latest.summary_zh: 本周欧洲IP焦点集中于UPC制度完善与判例演化。PMAC正式开放，为FRAND等争议提供非诉路径。米兰地院裁定特定条件下专利文献可视为公知常识，并允许在信息不对称时转移举证责任，加重被告抗辩压力。EPO强化抗体权利要求全范围效果验证标准。英国方面，UKIPO更新软件专利审查指南，二手平台反假货成为执法新重点。
daily_audio_latest.summary_en: This week, European IP developments centered on procedural enhancements at the Unified Patent Court and evolving national standards. The Patent Mediation and Arbitration Centre (PMAC) formally launched, offering structured alternative dispute resolution for patent conflicts, including FRAND matters. Simultaneously, the UPC Milan Local Division issued significant rulings in tire patent cases, establishing that patent literature constitutes common general knowledge only in exceptional circumstances and allowing burden of proof shifts when information asymmetry exists. These decisions heighten evidentiary pressures on defendants controlling technical data. In prosecution news, the EPO reinforced strict plausibility standards for antibody claims, demanding credible technical effects across the full scope. Conversely, the UKIPO updated software patent examination practices following the Emotional Perception Supreme Court decision, aligning closer with EPO hardware-based approaches. daily_audio_latest.closing_line_zh: 总结来看，今天的欧洲 IP 动态仍然围绕专利、商标、SEP标准必要专利展开，接下来值得继续关注UPC上诉庭对创造性评估方法的统一口径。
daily_audio_latest.closing_line_en: Overall, today's European IP signals center on Patents, Trade marks, SEPs. The next point to watch is UPC Court of Appeal methodology for assessing inventive step.
transcript_lines_zh: 今天是2026年6月9日。以下是今天欧洲 IP 圈最重要的几条变化。
先看第一条，法院确认仅例外情况下专利文献可视为公知常识，如系列文件呈现连贯技术图景。后续要看欧洲层面类似案件的裁判尺度和程序口径会不会继续收紧。
再看第二条，EPO实践中，若技术效果无法在权利要求全范围内被证实可信，则不能支持创造性。值得关注的是，EPO对抗体权利要求全范围技术效果可信度的审查标准依然严格。
再看第三条，标题显示文章主题为NGT-1植物知识产权对欧洲构成的地缘战略挑战。值得关注的是，需关注全文是否详述欧盟对NGT-1植物的最新监管提案及其对专利适格性的影响。
最后看第四条，新任律师需从单纯识别法律风险转向结合宏观微观经济压力提供商业决策支持。值得关注的是，新执业律师需培养将法律分析转化为商业决策支持的复合能力。
总结来看，今天的欧洲 IP 动态仍然围绕专利、商标、SEP标准必要专利展开，接下来值得继续关注UPC上诉庭对创造性评估方法的统一口径。
transcript_lines_en: Today is June 9, 2026. Here are the most relevant European IP developments in today's briefing.

First, Patent literature qualifies as common general knowledge only in exceptional circumstances involving coherent technical s. Why it matters: Rights holders can leverage strong preliminary evidence to shift evidentiary burdens when defendants possess exclusive technical inform.

Next, Technical effects must be credible across the full claim scope to support inventive step at the EPO. Why it matters: Offers a pathway to broader antibody protection where full sequence claims are too restrictive for commercial needs.

Next, The article positions NGT-1 plant IP rights as a geostrategic issue for the European region. Why it matters: The framing suggests potential strategic shifts in how NGT-1 assets are valued or protected in Europe.

Finally, New attorneys must shift from pure legal risk identification to providing commercially contextualized business decision. Why it matters: Clients increasingly expect attorneys to integrate legal analysis with commercial strategy, requiring advice that supports decisive bus.
Overall, today's European IP signals center on Patents, Trade marks, SEPs. The next point to watch is UPC Court of Appeal methodology for assessing inventive step.

daily_audio_latest.transcript_en:
Today is June 9, 2026. Here are the most relevant European IP developments in today's briefing.
First, Patent literature qualifies as common general knowledge only in exceptional circumstances involving coherent technical s. Why it matters: Rights holders can leverage strong preliminary evidence to shift evidentiary burdens when defendants possess exclusive technical inform.
Next, Technical effects must be credible across the full claim scope to support inventive step at the EPO. Why it matters: Offers a pathway to broader antibody protection where full sequence claims are too restrictive for commercial needs.
Next, The article positions NGT-1 plant IP rights as a geostrategic issue for the European region. Why it matters: The framing suggests potential strategic shifts in how NGT-1 assets are valued or protected in Europe.
Finally, New attorneys must shift from pure legal risk identification to providing commercially contextualized business decision. Why it matters: Clients increasingly expect attorneys to integrate legal analysis with commercial strategy, requiring advice that supports decisive bus.
Overall, today's European IP signals center on Patents, Trade marks, SEPs. The next point to watch is UPC Court of Appeal methodology for assessing inventive step.

topics.headline_zh: UPC机制成熟：ADR落地与判例趋严
topics.headline_en: UPC Maturity: PMAC Launches and Courts Enforce Strict Evidentiary Standards
topics.summary_zh: 2026年上半年，统一专利法院（UPC）运行趋于成熟。PMAC调解仲裁中心正式运营，为FRAND等争议提供非诉路径。中国跃居EPO申请来源国前三，统一专利采纳率显著提升。司法实践方面，米兰、赫尔辛基等地方法院在证据披露、权利要求解释及等同原则适用上确立严格标准，强调程序合规与审查档案一致性，企业需警惕诉讼风险。
key_points: PMAC调解仲裁中心上线，形成诉讼与ADR并行机制，利好降低维权成本及解决SEP/FRAND纠纷。
中国首次跻身EPO申请来源国前三，统一专利请求量强劲增长，中小企业参与度显著提高。
多地方法院判例确立严格证据规则，迟交证据易被排除，审查档案陈述将限制权利要求保护范围。
actions: 评估引入PMAC调解机制处理欧洲专利许可及FRAND争议，以优化维权成本结构。
复盘欧洲专利申请策略，确保授权阶段审查意见答复与后续诉讼权利要求解释保持一致。
建立严格的UPC诉讼证据前置管理流程，避免因迟交证据或来源不明导致关键证据失权。
watchlist: UPC上诉法院关于管辖权范围提请欧盟法院裁决的最终结果及其对单一专利效力的影响。
EPO 2027年指南修订中关于修改依据强制指明的要求，及其与UPC判例的协同效应。
杜塞尔多夫等热门分院新增合议庭后的判例倾向变化，特别是针对功能性限定的解释口径。
topics.summary_en: In the first half of 2026, the Unified Patent Court (UPC) demonstrated operational maturity with the formal launch of the Patent Mediation and Arbitration Centre (PMAC). This development provides a structured alternative dispute resolution pathway for FRAND and cross-border patent conflicts. Concurrently, Unitary Patent adoption accelerated, driven by significant uptake among SMEs and a surge in filings from China, which entered the top three source countries at the EPO. Judicially, Local Divisions in Milan and Helsinki established rigorous precedents regarding evidence disclosure and claim interpretation. Courts are increasingly excluding late-filed evidence and aligning protection scope with prosecution history. These shifts necessitate stricter procedural compliance and integrated portfolio strategies for rights holders operating in Europe.
key_points_en: PMAC operational launch creates parallel ADR mechanisms, offering cost-effective resolution for SEP/FRAND disputes alongside traditional litigation.
China ranks among top three EPO filing sources, while Unitary Patent uptake grows significantly, particularly among small and medium-sized enterprises.
Local Divisions enforce strict evidentiary rules, excluding late submissions and limiting claim scope based on prosecution file consistency.
actions_en: Evaluate PMAC mediation protocols to optimize cost structures for European licensing and FRAND-related negotiations.
Align prosecution strategies to ensure examination responses remain consistent with future litigation claim interpretations and validity defenses.
Implement rigorous pre-litigation evidence management workflows to prevent exclusion of key materials due to procedural delays or sourcing issues.
watchlist_en: Final outcomes of UPC referrals to the CJEU regarding jurisdictional scope and their impact on Unitary Patent enforceability.
Synergies between upcoming 2027 EPO Guidelines on amendment bases and evolving UPC case law on claim construction.
Judicial trends in Düsseldorf’s newly expanded panels, specifically concerning the interpretation of functional claim limitations.

topics.headline_zh: UPC重塑SEP格局：禁令与费率双轨并行
topics.headline_en: UPC Reshapes SEP Landscape: Injunctions, Rates, and ADR Mechanisms
topics.summary_zh: 2026年上半年，统一专利法院（UPC）在SEP领域展现强干预力，曼海姆分院打破传统直接裁定FRAND费率，并频繁签发针对中国企业的反反诉禁令。与此同时，英国法院坚持全球费率管辖，导致中英判决冲突加剧。PMAC调解中心启用为争议提供新路径，但司法碎片化与跨境执行风险仍是中国出海企业面临的核心挑战。
key_points: UPC曼海姆分院突破德国传统，主动裁定FRAND费率并签发反反诉禁令，强化对实施者的程序约束。
中英法院就同一案件作出冲突的全球费率判决，凸显管辖权争夺激烈，增加企业合规不确定性。
UPC专利调解与仲裁中心（PMAC）正式运营，诉讼与ADR并行机制成为解决FRAND争议的新常态。
actions: 收到侵权通知须立即书面表达许可意愿，以保留FRAND抗辩权，避免因程序瑕疵被颁禁令。
审查许可协议中关于退出UPC管辖的决策权条款，提前布局单一专利与经典欧洲专利的组合策略。
建立中英欧多地诉讼联动应对机制，评估利用PMAC进行调解的可能性，以降低全球诉讼成本。
watchlist: 英国最高法院对专利池FRAND义务及全球费率管辖权的最终裁定动向。
UPC上诉法院对长臂管辖权及反诉禁令边界的进一步司法解释。
欧盟层面SEP监管框架改革细则及其与各国司法实践的协调情况。

topics.china_impact_summary_zh: 这条长窗显示，SEP 风险已经从传统通信终端延伸到车载与 IoT，并在德国、英国和 UPC 三条诉讼线同步抬升。对中国企业来说，下一阶段重点不只是单案应对，而是把许可准备、诉讼预案和规则跟踪并行推进。
china_action_points: 涉及车载、蜂窝、Wi-Fi 或 IoT 出海业务的中国企业，应尽快核查专利池与双边许可覆盖，避免产品上市后再被动补谈。
在德国、英国和 UPC 有销售、供应链或客户落点的企业，应同步准备 FRAND 谈判材料、可比许可证据与禁令应对预案。
法务、标准与商务团队需要持续跟踪英欧 SEP 政策和竞争法变化，避免沿用单一市场的许可策略应对欧洲。
针对已进入欧洲市场的中国终端、部件与整车企业，建议把 SEP 许可预算、争议升级路径和管辖博弈纳入年度经营安排。

topics.summary_en: In the first half of 2026, the Unified Patent Court (UPC) demonstrated significant intervention in standard-essential patent (SEP) disputes. The Mannheim Local Division diverged from traditional German practice by actively determining FRAND rates and frequently issuing anti-anti-suit injunctions against foreign proceedings. Concurrently, conflicting global rate judgments from UK and Chinese courts have intensified jurisdictional tensions, increasing compliance uncertainty for multinational implementers. The formal launch of the Patent Mediation and Arbitration Centre (PMAC) in June 2026 introduces a structured alternative dispute resolution pathway within the UPC framework. Despite these developments, judicial fragmentation and cross-border enforcement risks remain critical challenges. Review existing license agreements to clarify decision-making authority regarding UPC opt-outs and unitary patent designations, ensuring strategic control over centralized validity...
Develop coordinated litigation strategies across the UK, Europe, and Asia, evaluating PMAC mediation options to reduce global costs while monitoring evolving UPC case law on jurisd...

UPC Court of Appeal decisions clarifying the boundaries of long-arm jurisdiction, anti-suit injunctions, and the admissibility of preliminary objections in SEP-related proceedings.

topics.headline_zh: EUIPO强化执法与融资，明确商标审查红线
topics.headline_en: EUIPO Strengthens Enforcement, Clarifies Post-Brexit Rights, and Expands Design Tools
topics.summary_zh: 2026年上半年，EUIPO联合欧盟委员会及Eurojust严厉打击网络假冒与有组织犯罪，并推出IPEP数字执法工具。司法层面，法院裁定脱欧后纯英国权利无法阻碍欧盟商标，且名人姓名注册受限。此外，EUIPO携手EIF解锁IP融资，DesignView成为全球最大外观搜索库，中小企业可利用基金降低注册成本。
key_points: 执法升级：EUIPO联合多方打击网络假冒，推广IPEP数字工具，强化跨境协作。
司法明确：脱欧过渡期后，仅依英国法享有的在先权利不得用于欧盟商标异议；名人姓名注册因描述性被拒。
赋能创新：DesignView成全球最大外观搜索库；EUIPO与EIF合作解锁IP融资，SME基金持续补贴申请费。
actions: 排查英国权利风险：确认在欧商标布局不依赖已失效的纯英国未注册商标权利。
利用数字化工具：使用DesignView进行外观查重，通过IPEP监控潜在侵权线索。
申请资金与融资支持：符合条件的中小企业申请EUIPO费用报销，探索IP质押融资渠道。
watchlist: 手工艺品地理标志（CIGI）国家向欧盟制度过渡的最终截止与合规要求。
欧盟针对在线平台假冒商品治理的最新配套法规与执行口径。
名人姓名及文化IP在欧盟商标注册中的描述性认定边界变化。
topics.summary_en: During the first half of 2026, the EUIPO intensified enforcement against online counterfeiting and organized crime through collaboration with Europol and the European Commission, while promoting the IP Enforcement Portal (IPEP). Legally, the Court of Justice confirmed that UK-only rights cannot support EU trademark oppositions decided after the Brexit transition period. Simultaneously, the General Court annulled an EUIPO decision regarding the Obelix mark, emphasizing comprehensive reputation assessments. On the innovation front, DesignView became the world’s largest design image search engine, and the EUIPO partnered with the European Investment Fund to facilitate IP-backed financing. Additionally, the new EU framework for Craft and Industrial Geographical Indications continues its implementation, with national systems phasing out by December 2026.

Legal Clarity: CJEU rules UK-only rights cannot block EU trademarks post-transition; General Court mandates comprehensive reputation evidence in invalidity proceedings, annulling t...

Leverage Digital Resources: Utilize the expanded DesignView database for comprehensive prior art checks and engage with IPEP training to enhance detection of counterfeit goods in s...
Prepare for GI Transition: Rights holders in craft and industrial sectors must determine if existing national protections require conversion to the new EU CIGI framework before the...
watchlist_en: Final compliance deadlines and procedural requirements for the full transition of Craft and Industrial Geographical Indications from national to EU systems.
Evolution of EU regulatory frameworks and enforcement priorities targeting online platform liability for counterfeit goods and digital piracy.
Judicial trends in assessing reputation and distinctiveness for well-known marks and celebrity names in light of recent General Court annulments.

topics.headline_zh: 欧英强化IP犯罪协同执法
topics.headline_en: EU and UK Intensify Cross-Border Enforcement Against IP Crime
topics.summary_zh: 2026年上半年，欧盟与英国显著升级假冒打击力度。EUIPO联合欧盟委员会及Eurojust深化跨机构协作，聚焦药品与网络侵权；英国UKIPO获资金延至2029年并拟扩编，重点监管二手平台。执法呈现刑事化、跨境协同及全渠道覆盖趋势，中企需警惕供应链合规风险及新兴渠道侵权指控。
key_points: 欧盟层面：EUIPO联合欧盟委员会、Eurojust强化跨机构协作，重点打击药品假冒及在线盗版，SHIELD VI行动查获巨资假货。
英国动态：UKIPO确认IP犯罪部门资金延至2029年并计划扩编，发布二手时尚反假指南，将Resale平台纳入监管重点。
执法趋势：知识产权犯罪被视作有组织犯罪一部分，执法从单一行政查处向刑事司法协同、全渠道（含二手/耗材）监测转变。
actions: 建立出口产品全流程溯源体系，确保供应链合规，防范因假冒耗材或配件引发的连带法律责任。
将Vinted等二手交易平台纳入品牌日常监测范围，针对高频侵权品类提前布局取证与投诉机制。
关注EMPACT框架下的执法优先事项，配合海关与平台治理，建立快速响应机制以应对跨境刑事调查。
watchlist: 英国IP犯罪部门扩编的具体职能范围变化及2029年前执法案件数据趋势。
欧盟层面针对网络假冒和盗版联合行动的后续配套法规或明确执法口径。
二手平台反假货指南实施后，平台责任边界及对品牌方维权流程的具体影响。
topics.topic_name_zh: 假冒执法 / 品牌保护
topics.summary_en: During the first half of 2026, the European Union and the United Kingdom significantly escalated enforcement against intellectual property crime. The EUIPO, European Commission, and Eurojust deepened inter-agency collaboration, targeting pharmaceutical counterfeiting and online piracy through initiatives like Operation SHIELD VI. Concurrently, the UK Intellectual Property Office secured funding for its IP Crime Unit until 2029, with plans for expansion and a new focus on regulating secondary marketplaces. Enforcement strategies are increasingly treating IP infringement as organized crime, shifting from administrative measures to coordinated criminal justice actions across all channels, including resale platforms and consumables. Rights holders must adapt to this heightened scrutiny by strengthening supply chain compliance and monitoring emerging digital sales channels to mitigate liabili...
key_points_en: EU agencies intensified cross-border cooperation against pharmaceutical counterfeits and online piracy, exemplified by the multi-national Operation SHIELD VI seizures.
The UK extended funding for its IP Crime Unit until 2029 and issued new guidance targeting counterfeit goods on second-hand fashion platforms.
Enforcement trends reflect a shift toward treating IP crime as organized criminal activity, with expanded monitoring of resale markets and consumable supplies.
actions_en: Implement robust end-to-end traceability for export products to ensure supply chain compliance and prevent liability from counterfeit components.
Integrate secondary marketplaces like Vinted into routine brand monitoring protocols, establishing rapid evidence collection and takedown procedures for high-risk categories.
Align internal response mechanisms with EMPACT enforcement priorities to facilitate swift cooperation with customs and platforms during cross-border criminal investigations.
watchlist_en: Changes in the functional scope of the UK IP Crime Unit and enforcement data trends leading up to 2029.
Subsequent regulatory developments or clarified enforcement guidelines resulting from the EU joint action against online counterfeiting and piracy.
The impact of new second-hand platform guidance on intermediary liability boundaries and brand owner enforcement workflows.
